settings.label: Origin
settings.title: Born from digital art
settings.content:
BakAbo was born from Roberto Picchioni's archive: over 12,700 NFTs and 2,400 AI artworks that form the brand's visual DNA. Each collection is a chapter of this visual encyclopaedia.

The name unites Baka (fool, jester — the one who challenges convention) with the idea of abolishing fast fashion: slow, intentional clothing with a strong identity.

settings.label: Model
settings.title: Print-on-demand, zero waste
settings.content: No warehouse. No overproduction. Every piece is printed and shipped only when ordered — eliminating the waste of traditional fast fashion. Quality is guaranteed by Printify, one of the most reliable print-on-demand providers in Europe.

settings.quote: Artificial intelligence does not replace art — it transforms it into something we could never have imagined.

settings.headline: About BakAbo
settings.tagline: An AI-art atelier where fashion, technology and visual identity converge.
